Findings.Title: Anomalous behavior of an IAM user
Findings.Description: APIs commonly used for reconnaissance were called from an unusual IP.

Findings.Title: EC2 instance is performing a port scan
Findings.Description: EC2 instance i-0abc123def456 is probing ports on 10.0.0.0/16.

Findings.Title: EC2 instance querying Bitcoin mining pool DNS
Findings.Description: EC2 instance i-0def456ghi789 is querying DNS names associated with Bitcoin mining pools.
